source: INTRO MODULE_ The Basics of Nodes and Node Dojo_2MAY2024.blend

driver.note: The supplied Blender file displays its cached frame-1 Geometry Nodes result on open even though the scene timeline is saved at frame 1405. The gallery preserves that visible on-open reference state.

validation: Exact topology and visual composition with local bounds within 0.000003 units. Blurmed CFF straight-segment samples are dissolved at Fill Curve while authored Bezier anchors remain, and Blender-compatible normalized 4D Perlin noise reproduces all ten per-glyph bounce offsets.
